result.evidence_summary: Multiple sites including an apparent official website (planicaski.com) and Kranjska Gora tourism page promote the Planica Ski Marathon as an Euroloppet event with specific dates in February 2025/2026, registration details, and course info. Registration pages like eventrac.co.uk exist, but no past race results, YouTube videos, or official listings in Worldloppet/Euroloppet/Ski Classics were found in the results. Directory listings like worldsMarathons and ahotu mention it but provide weak evidence.
